subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Michael Stanley (CUST_0062) exhibited suspicious activity indicative of money laundering. High average monthly balances inconsistent with transaction types and descriptions suggest potential layering. Notably, on 2025-07-27, a wire transfer credit of $98,090.16 was received. Subsequently, four large wire transfer debits totaling $71,181.08 were made from 2025-07-28 to 2025-07-29.
key_indicators: Mismatch between transaction types and account balances
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Customer has multiple active accounts with high average monthly balances. The transaction types and descriptions do not align with the high balances, indicating potential layering activity. The customer's medium risk rating also raises suspicion.
